---
title: "injector.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/injector.py"
loc: 63
complexity: 8
logic_score: 2.47
style_score: 3.65
intel_score: 6.48
overall_score: 4.53
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SovereignInjector, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import SovereignInjector and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)
- [src.tools.brave_search](file://src.tools.brave_search)
- [src.tools.gemini_search](file://src.tools.gemini_search)
- [src.core](file://src.core)

### Exports
- `SovereignInjector`
- `__init__`
- `proactive_discovery`
- `proactive_lexicon_lift`
